fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Field that identifies paired evaluation items
fields.label: Pair Field
fields.name: pair_field

fields.description: Field that identifies the prompt/model/treatment variant
fields.label: Variant Field
fields.name: variant_field

fields.description: Numeric score field to compare within each pair
fields.label: Score Field
fields.name: score_field

fields.description: Optional baseline variant. When omitted, the first-seen variant is the baseline.
fields.label: Baseline Variant
fields.name: baseline_variant
